nodes.name: README.md
nodes.summary: Getting-started guide for the Delta Lake sink integration test demo, explaining prerequisites, setup steps, and how to run the RisingWave-to-Delta-Lake sinking scenario.

nodes.name: create_sink.sql
nodes.summary: Defines RisingWave sink configurations that write materialized view data to Delta Lake tables, covering both append-only and upsert sink modes.

nodes.name: create_source.sql
nodes.summary: Creates RisingWave source tables (`source` and `data_types`) from Kafka or datagen, providing the upstream data for the Delta Lake sink integration test with comprehensive type coverage.

nodes.name: docker-compose.yml
nodes.summary: Docker Compose setup for the Delta Lake sink integration test, starting Spark, MinIO (S3-compatible storage), and supporting services to host Delta Lake tables.

nodes.name: prepare.sh
nodes.summary: Minimal shell script that prepares the Delta Lake test environment, typically initializing MinIO buckets or Spark tables before the integration test runs.
